scope: 1.1.0 adds pt-BR, zh-CN and ru (five languages), first-run OS-language detection, a five-language picker, one shared rule for which languages write decimals with a comma, and a Mine-view scroll fix. The launch notice announces 15:00 UTC only, with no local-time aside. No changes to consensus, key derivation, mining or security.
